Provide Authentication Token

To finish, provide your authentication token to VSCode.

1. Copy the token below to your clipboard (expires in 5 minutes)

2. In VSCode, open the Command Palette (Ctrl/Cmd + Shift + P), type Windsurf: Provide Authentication Token, and hit Enter.

3. You should see a little welcome message on the bottom right of your Visual Studio Code window if authorization was successful. You're all set to use Windsurf Plugin!

If you have any trouble, please reach out to our support team.
